inputs.prompt: Story: A community centre that was scheduled for demolition has been saved after a last-minute council vote. The reporter is standing outside the building. The stand-up will be used in the middle of a 2-minute news package, between an interview clip from the campaign leader and a clip from the council leader. Duration: 20 seconds. Reporter: David Chen.
Story: New housing development being built on former farmland. Reporter is at the construction site. Duration: 15 seconds. For a news bulletin package.

Story: A refugee reception centre on the Greek island of Lesbos has been rebuilt after a fire destroyed the previous facility two years ago. The new facility was funded by the EU. The reporter is at the entrance to the new centre. Duration: 25 seconds. The stand-up is for a European radio news package, placed between a clip from a UNHCR representative and a clip from a resident. Reporter: Sophia Papadopoulos. Tone: Measured, empathetic, journalistic.
